title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
